snapshot_items.why_it_matters: Readers can enter the corpus without reconstructing the stack ad hoc.
Naming, citation, and verification remain bounded instead of drifting by inference.
Readers can tell what is claimed, how mature it is, and how strongly to read it.
Cross-layer overread is constrained before stronger surfaces are contradicted.

snapshot_items.current_local_condition: present locally; bounded but still local
snapshot_items.why_it_matters: References stay stable and new package mentions remain bounded.
Serious bounded reading and handoff are possible without pretending to export the whole corpus.
snapshot_items.main_blocker_or_note: external bundle logic stays local until cleaner cutover

snapshot_items.why_it_matters: Promotion planning is explicit instead of being confused with execution.
snapshot_items.main_blocker_or_note: promotion planning is not release authorization

snapshot_items.why_it_matters: Unresolved territory and later fixes remain typed and non-theatrical.
snapshot_items.main_blocker_or_note: local non-closure remains real rather than hidden

snapshot_items.why_it_matters: Entry surfaces point across the stack without Windows-style traversal confusion.
Verification stays possible while local control layers continue to accumulate.
snapshot_items.main_blocker_or_note: manifest presence is not public-history completion
